description.value:
You hack the tech items of a creature within 30 feet, causing annoying pop-ups and other inconveniences to hamper them. Attempt a @Check[computers|against:will] check against the target's Will DC.

Critical Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure You're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Stupefied]{Stupefied 1} until the end of your next turn.
